game_name: Glory of Heracles IV: Gift from the Gods

special_mechanics.name: Immortality
special_mechanics.description: The player character acquires a mysterious power that shields him from bodily harm, making him immortal. This allows execution of actions other characters cannot perform, such as jumping off high cliffs without taking damage.

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Empirical/qualitative data only. Game is an RPG where specific character movement physics are not documented in available sources.
